holdings.infoBox: GDXJ is an equity ETF with a total of 121 individual holdings. The top holdings are Coeur Mining stock at 7.07%, Alamos Gold at 6.43%, Evolution Mining at 6.31%, Endeavour Mining at 5.86%, and Equinox Gold at 5.47%.

overview.description: The VanEck Junior Gold Miners ETF (GDXJ) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the MVIS Global Junior Gold Miners index, a market-cap-weighted index of global gold- and silver-mining firms, focusing on small caps. GDXJ was launched on Nov 11, 2009 and is issued by VanEck.
